findings.title: Missing Optional Manifest Fields
findings.description: The SKILL.md manifest does not include optional fields such as `allowed-tools`, `license`, or `compatibility`. While these are not security requirements, their absence reduces transparency.

findings.title: Supply Chain Risk – Unpinned Dependency Installation
findings.description: The skill instructs users to install the `perf-profiler-bridge` package via pip without a version pin. The bundled script `setup_profiler.py` also runs a pip install without pinning. This opens the door to dependency confusion or typosquatting attacks where a malicious package could be substituted.
findings.evidence: Script executes: `subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', 'perf-profiler-bridge'], check=True)` with no version constraint. SKILL.md also provides unbounded `pip install perf-profiler-bridge` command.
findings.remediation: Pin the dependency to a specific version (e.g., `pip install perf-profiler-bridge==1.2.3`) and verify its integrity via checksum or hash.
